createSubscription.title: Create new subscription
createSubscription.subtitle: Set up a new subscription to access AI models for your applications.
createSubscription.subscriptionInformation: Subscriptions are tied to applications or use cases, not individual users. Each subscription provides a single API key for accessing multiple models with enforced rate limits and token quotas.

messages.minLength: Subscription name must be at least {{minLength}} characters.
messages.maxLength: Subscription name must be at most {{maxLength}} characters.

messages.minLength: Application reference must be at least {{minLength}} characters.
messages.maxLength: Application reference must be at most {{maxLength}} characters.

subscriptionPurpose.label: Subscription Purpose
subscriptionPurpose.placeholder: Explain what do you need this subscription for

messages.maxLength: Subscription purpose must be at most {{maxLength}} characters.

adGroup.label: AD-Group for management
adGroup.placeholder: Choose correct group for subscription management

notifications.errorMessage: There was an error creating the subscription. Please try once again

modelDetails.noGuardrails: No guardrails are configured for this model.

notifications.noActiveSubscription: You need an active subscription to request access to models.

subscriptionDetails.noModels: No models are currently associated with this subscription.
subscriptionDetails.noUserRequests: No user requests were submitted for this subscription.

copyEndpointUrl.error: Failed to copy the endpoint URL.

validation.maxLength: Name must be at most {{maxLength}} characters.

requestAccessToModelsDialog.title: Request Access to New Models
requestAccessToModelsDialog.chooseModelsTitle: Choose models you would like to have access to - maximum 4

justifyAccessNeed.label: Why would you like to get access for these models?
justifyAccessNeed.placeholder: Explain why you need access to these models

messages.maxLength: Justification must be at most {{maxLength}} characters.

notifications.errorMessage: There was an error submitting the model access request. Please try once again.

justifyQuotaIncrease.label: Why would you like to increase quota for subscription?
justifyQuotaIncrease.placeholder: Explain how this increase will impact your project

messages.maxLength: Explanation must be at most {{maxLength}} characters.

notifications.errorMessage: There was an error submitting the quota increase request. Please try once again.

deactivateSubscriptionDialog.title: Deactivate Subscription
deactivateSubscriptionDialog.description: You are about to deactivate the subscription {{subscriptionName}}. Deactivating this subscription will:
bulletPoints: Pause all active processes that use this subscription.
Mark the subscription as inactive in the system.
Retain all data, configurations, and settings for future reactivation.
Allow you to reactivate the subscription at any time.
deactivateSubscriptionDialog.confirmationMessage: Are you sure you would like to proceed?

notifications.successMessage: Your subscription has been deactivated successfully.
notifications.errorMessage: There was an error when deactivating the subscription. Please try once again.

activateSubscriptionDialog.title: Activate Subscription
activateSubscriptionDialog.description: You are about to activate the subscription {{subscriptionName}}. Activating this subscription will:
bulletPoints: Resume all processes using this subscription.
Restore access to all associated models.
Mark the subscription as active in the system.
activateSubscriptionDialog.confirmationMessage: Are you sure you want to proceed?

notifications.successMessage: Your subscription has been successfully activated.
notifications.errorMessage: An error occurred while activating the subscription. Please try again.

extendSubscriptionDialog.title: Extend Subscription
extendSubscriptionDialog.description: You are about to submit a request to extend the expiry date for subscription. When would you like this subscription to expire?:
extendSubscriptionDialog.justificationLabel: Justify why you need to extend the subscription
extendSubscriptionDialog.justificationPlaceholder: Explain here how this extension will impact your project
extendSubscriptionDialog.confirmationMessage: Are you sure you want to proceed?

notifications.successMessage: Extend subscription request has been successfully submitted
notifications.errorMessage: Something went wrong. Please try again.

emptyStates.guardrailsNone: No guardrails found for the selected scope.
emptyStates.selectSubscriptionDesc: Select subscription to view its models.
emptyStates.selectScopeDesc: Select a subscription or a model to configure guardrails for the relevant scope.

adminActionModal.approveInfo: Approving will activate the subscription  {{subscriptionName}} and notify the user  {{subscriptionConsumer}}.
adminActionModal.approveAgainInfo: Approving again will move the subscription back to active {{subscriptionName}} and notify the user {{subscriptionConsumer}}.
adminActionModal.rejectInfo: Rejecting will cancel the subscription {{subscriptionName}} and notify the user {{subscriptionConsumer}}.
adminActionModal.deactivateInfo: You are about to deactivate the subscription {{subscriptionName}}. Deactivating will suspend access but retain all configurations. The user {{subscriptionConsumer}} will be notified. Are you sure you want to proceed?
adminActionModal.expiryInfo: Set an expiration date for this subscription. After this date, the subscription will be automatically deactivated. This is useful for temporary projects or testing purposes.

deleteInfo.intro: Deleting this subscription will remove it from the system.  Deleting this subscription will result in the following:
points: All associated models and configurations will be permanently deleted.
Any ongoing API calls will be terminated immediately.
Users with access to this subscription will no longer be able to use its models or data.
deleteInfo.summary: Please note that this action is permanent and cannot be undone. Are you sure you would like to proceed?

adminActionModal.reactivateInfo: Reactivating this subscription will restore its active status and allow access to all associated models, services, and configurations. Once reactivated, all applications associated with this subscription will regain access to its features and services. Are you sure you want to reactivate this subscription?
adminActionModal.unlimitedNotification: Subscription expiry date set to unlimited.
adminActionModal.subscriptionApproved: Subscription has been approved and is now active
adminActionModal.subscriptionApprovedWithoutJustification: Subscription has been approved and is now active.

addNewModel.title: Add New Model to the Catalog
addNewModel.subtitle: Expand available AI options and enhance functionality for users

discovery.title: Model Discovery
discovery.subtitle: Browse AI models and your subscriptions.

search.placeholder: Search by name, provider/department, description/app reference, or ID...

discovery.noModelsFiltered: No models match your filters. Adjust your search or clear filters.
discovery.noSubscriptions: No subscriptions found. Create one to get started!
discovery.modelNotFoundMsg: We couldn't find the model you were looking for.

validation.justification: Justification is required and must be within limit.

azure-prompt-shield.title: Azure Prompt Shield
azure-prompt-shield.description: Protects against prompt injection and jailbreak attempts before prompts reach the model.

azure-text-moderation.title: Azure Text Moderation
azure-text-moderation.description: Checks inputs and outputs for harmful or toxic content.

litellm-content-filter.title: LiteLLM Content Filter
litellm-content-filter.description: Masks emails, credit cards, and API keys in prompts before sending them to the model.

bedrock-pre-guard.title: Bedrock Pre Guard
bedrock-pre-guard.description: Applies Bedrock guardrails such as toxicity threshold and PII detection before the model is called.

safety-alignment.title: Safety Alignment
safety-alignment.description: Ensures model behavior is aligned with safety policies, reducing harmful or policy-violating outputs.

embedding-quality-assurance.title: Embedding Quality Assurance
embedding-quality-assurance.description: Validates and monitors embedding quality to maintain reliable semantic search and similarity performance.

validationMessage.noModelSelected: Select at least one model before saving

guardrails.title: Guardrails
guardrails.chooseModelLabel: Choose model to configure its guardrails. Note you need to activate models for the subscription first to see them in this section and save changes if any. Inactive subscription models will not show.

validationMessage.noModelSelected: Select a model to configure its guardrails from the Models section above.
validationMessage.noGuardrailsForModel: This model does not have any guardrails configured yet.

deactivate.title: Deactivate Subscription
deactivate.description: Temporarily disables a model, making it inactive while retaining all data and configurations for potential future reactivation.

reactivate.title: Reactivate Subscription
reactivate.description: Reactivates a previously deactivated subscription, making it active and available for use again.

delete.title: Delete Subscription
delete.description: Permanently removes a model and all its associated data, ensuring it cannot be recovered or used again.
